evals.expected_output: Validates git state, discovers templates, analyzes commits/files, pushes with upstream tracking, creates a draft PR with gh, and reports URL/status.
assertions: Validates branch, working tree, and commits ahead of base before pushing or creating a PR.
Discovers and preserves GitHub PR template sections, filling unknown sections with N/A.
Includes commit summary, files changed, testing, and PRP artifact references when present.
Uses git push -u origin HEAD for upstream tracking.
Uses gh pr create/view when available and reports URL/status, or reports the unavailable dependency.

evals.prompt: Create a pull request, but I have unstaged changes.
evals.expected_output: Stops before PR creation, reports uncommitted changes, and recommends committing or stashing, with `prp-commit` as the next skill.
assertions: Validates branch, working tree, and commits ahead of base before pushing or creating a PR.
Discovers and preserves GitHub PR template sections, filling unknown sections with N/A.
Includes commit summary, files changed, testing, and PRP artifact references when present.
Uses git push -u origin HEAD for upstream tracking.
Uses gh pr create/view when available and reports URL/status, or reports the unavailable dependency.
